name: mailwatch
description: Watch email inboxes (Gmail OAuth, IMAP, or AgentMail) and process unread messages with rules — keyword, regex, attachment, or AI matching with actions like notify, CRM update, calendar import, and draft replies. Gmail backend creates real drafts in your Gmail inbox; AgentMail backend sends via AgentMail with auto-send rules or WhatsApp approval.
author: CupBots
intent: Monitor email inboxes, forward matching emails to WhatsApp, and draft/send replies via Gmail or AgentMail
config: Default WhatsApp JID for notifications (per-mailbox notify_chat overrides this)
OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console — required for Gmail backend
OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console
API key from agentmail.to — enables outbound email sending
AgentMail inbox address used as sender and inbox_id, e.g. pa@ai.cupbots.com
Sender display name, e.g. ClientName Assistant
Fallback reply-to for new emails (replies auto-use the inbound address)
Svix signing secret (whsec_...) for verifying inbound webhooks via hub relay

marketplace.tagline: Turn your inbox into an automation engine
marketplace.long_description: Watch your email inbox and process unread messages automatically based on rules you define. Three backends per mailbox: Gmail OAuth (one-click connect, AI drafts land as real drafts in your Gmail folder), generic IMAP (any provider with an app password), or AgentMail (a dedicated agent inbox). Match emails by keyword, regex, attachment type, or AI classification. Actions include WhatsApp notifications, CRM updates, calendar imports, and AI-drafted replies — with WhatsApp 👍/👎 deciding whether the bot sends the draft for you. Set up rules like 'any email from @acme.com with an invoice attachment -> notify me' and let the bot handle the rest.
